task_goal: Help the user judge whether an AI product operations pivot is worth exploring.
user_state: Has adjacent experience but weak technical depth and weak local mentorship.
constraints: Unclear short-term downside if the pivot fails
hidden_tradeoff: Long-term upside versus a fragile support system during the transition.
acceptable_diversity_notes: Good answers may recommend a cautious transition path or a phased test instead of a binary go/no-go.
